subject: FW: Westminster!
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Noital4u@aol.com [mailto:Noital4u@aol.com] 
Sent: Friday, December 28, 2007 9:14 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Westminster!


Good Morning Lesley!
 
It is almost time for the dog show, Jamie did get his confirmation and
he is in the show..  We are thrilled.
I  would like to be in NYC on Saturday, February 9, 2008 as they have
changed the Herding group judging to Monday.  It's the first time ever
for the Monday judging, as long as I can remember the Herding group was
judged on Tuesday.  
 
Would you be so kind as to let the proper people know about our arrival
date?   I will also need to get with you about the address of the
apartments.
 Is there parking at the building or someplace close?
 
How is Jeffrey doing?  Will he be in the city during the show?  I would
love to see him!  Did he make a decision about getting a dog?  What a
wonderful man he is... I really miss him.  
 
OK, I am off to enjoy the gorgeous Florida weather.  Thank you for all
your help.  Talk to you very soon.
 
Pamela

body_html:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

From: Noital4u@aol.com [mailto:Noital4u@aol.com]
Sent: Friday, December 28, 2007 9:14 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Westminster!

Good Morning Lesley!
 
It is almost time for the dog show, Jamie did get his confirmation and he is in the show..  We are thrilled.
I  would like to be in NYC on Saturday, February 9, 2008 as they have changed the Herding group judging to Monday.  It's the first time ever for the Monday judging, as long as I can remember the Herding group was judged on Tuesday. 
 
Would you be so kind as to let the proper people know about our arrival date?   I will also need to get with you about the address of the apartments.
 Is there parking at the building or someplace close?
 
How is Jeffrey doing?  Will he be in the city during the show?  I would love to see him!  Did he make a decision about getting a dog?  What a wonderful man he is... I really miss him. 
 
OK, I am off to enjoy the gorgeous Florida weather.  Thank you for all your help.  Talk to you very soon.
 
Pamela
